reasoning.typography: ABC Normal + JHA Times Now is a disciplined, confident pairing — avoids Inter/Fraunces cliché. Display type does real work.
reasoning.hierarchy: Hero dominates well, but below-fold becomes generic card grid. Headline 'Building AI to Simulate the World' works hard visually.
reasoning.distinctiveness: The hero ocean/birds metaphor is specific, but swap 'Runway' for any AI-video competitor and the structure still fits. Cards are commodity.
reasoning.color: Deep teal dominant, white/black restrained. Accent usage disciplined. Not decorative, but also not adventurous — safe tech palette.
reasoning.density: Hero breathes well, partner logos have space. But the card grid below follows uniform padding religion — timid, not confident.
reasoning.voice: Opens strong with poetic positioning, then degrades into 'Here are our products' card grid. IA doesn't reflect the ambition — becomes feature catalog.

winning_patterns: Custom type pairing (ABC Normal + JHA Times Now) shows discipline
Hero visual metaphor (ocean depth, flying birds) connects to 'simulate world' theme
White-on-dark hero contrast creates focus without decoration
Restrained color system — doesn't spray gradients everywhere
Partner logos treated with appropriate neutrality
anti_patterns: Below-fold degrades into generic product card grid — could be any SaaS
The 'AI is changing...' preamble is motivational-poster generic
Uniform card padding/spacing — timid density choices
IA structure doesn't support narrative — just product lineup
'Get Started' CTA is the least distinctive button copy possible
